THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, YVONNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 187 BLYTHDATE AVE $1,647.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,647.00, STAYED UNTIL MAR-19-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, 12 NOON. NO FURTHER STAYS. PLTF TO KEEP SECURITY DEPOSIT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, YVONNE HARVELL, LATEEF THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 187 BLYTHDALE AVE, SF, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT FOR $1,647.00 FOR BACK RENTS AGAINST YVONNE BROWN ONLY. EVICTION IS STAYED UNTIL 12:00 NOON ON 3/19/96. NO FURTHER STAYS. (SEE JUDGMENT FOR COMPLETE DETAILS).
